chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR. Criminal Transfer Application No. S- 09 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 02.02.2024. Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional Prosecutor General. Injured namely: Muhammad Ameen and Ali Sher are present in person. -.-.-. By consent this Criminal Transfer Application is allowed and Sessions case No.257/2014 Re. State versus Waseem alias Leemon Kalhoro and others arising out of crime No. 02/2014 of Police Station Ripri under sections 302, 324, 337-A(i), 337-F(iii), 337-H(ii), 427, 506/2, 504, 148, 149 PPC is hereby withdrawn from the file of learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge, Naushehro Feroze, who is stated to have been placed under suspension and the case is transferred to learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Naushehro Feroze with directions to expedite the matter and dispose of the same in accordance with law. J U D G E Irfan/PA
